name: app-launcher
description: Launch and close applications directly using the path to an executable

app.launch.description: Launch an executable by its file path

params.path: Absolute path to the .exe file (e.g. C:\Program Files\App\app.exe)
params.workingDir: Optional working directory for the launched process

app.close.description: Close a running application by its process name or executable path

params.name: Process name without extension (e.g. notepad, chrome) — or provide 'path' instead
params.path: Absolute path to the .exe file; the process name will be derived from the filename
